author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by phase 2.2 conformance dispatch (#764). LOGCUMSUMEXP_F64_PTX produces ~709.69 (= ln(f64::MAX)) for a 1-D input of small magnitudes (range [-0.5, 1.0]) where the correct cumulative answers stay below 4. This was one of the 5 sibling kernels that received the polynomial sweep in Dispatch C without direct probe coverage; the f32 version passes which suggests an exp_f64 inline approximation overflow or saturation in the kernel. Repro: cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --test conformance_reduction --features gpu gpu_logcumsumexp_forward. Test #764 keeps the GPU f64 forward case marked with #[ignore = "blocked on #786"]; CPU and GPU f32 paths both pass.
